resources.string: Downloads continue in the background, are SHA-256 verified, and are selected automatically. Memory preflight can refuse a model that is unsafe for this phone.
Coding-focused GGUF for PocketIDE\'s llama.cpp backend.
Smaller legacy 3B Q4_0 coding GGUF for higher-memory phones. PocketIDE checks this device before loading.
Recommended balanced-quality Q4_K_M 3B coding GGUF for higher-memory phones. PocketIDE checks this device before loading.
Arm-optimized ExecuTorch PTE with its required tokenizer.

GGUF is capped by model metadata, device RAM, and a real KV cache preflight. Above 4K, PocketIDE uses Q8 KV with Flash Attention. PTE limits remain fixed by the exported file. A 65K or 131K selection is never treated as proof that a model or phone supports it.
Scan all project files locally and inject query relevant code chunks that fit the true native context
Large project memory is indexed retrieval, not hidden transformer context. The retrieved prompt labels indexed source size separately from the active model window.
